stories.title: World Cup updates: Merino delivers late winner as ...
FIFA rejects Belgium request; Balogun can play
stories.summary: FIFA has ruled a request from the Belgium federation for an explanation of Folarin Balogun's suspended red card as "inadmissible," meaning it has no grounds to appeal the decision and the U.S. forward remains cleared to play against Belgium on Monday.

stories.title: Sources: DeRozan cut by Kings, hits free agency
stories.summary: Multiple contenders are expected to have interest in DeMar DeRozan after the Kings waived the six-time All-Star, making him a free agent.

stories.title: Trump: I asked Infantino to 'review' Balogun red
stories.summary: President Donald Trump said Monday he called FIFA president Gianni Infantino to review the red card given to USMNT striker Folarin Balogun in the team's match against Bosnia-Herzegovina, calling it a "horrible" call.

stories.title: Ex-UK player Kriisa indicted on $2.2M fraud scam
stories.summary: Former Kentucky basketball player Kerr Kriisa has been arrested and indicted on a $2.2 million fraud scheme, the Department of Justice announced on Monday.
